purpose: Execution board for turning the Top 10 quantum attack directions from v0 artifacts into a one-year technical-resolution portfolio.
portfolio_state: stage 1o evidence hardening; B2 now has a posterior-weighted decoder-risk ledger, B6 has a structural/electronic proxy boundary, and B10 remains a denominator-boundary track

decision_rules.monthly_keep_rule: Keep a direction only if the next 30-day artifact can falsify or improve a concrete claim.
decision_rules.merge_rule: Merge directions when their validation stack is shared, such as B4 plus B8 or B1 plus B7.
decision_rules.technical_gate_rule: Do not promote a direction into publication, patent, financing, or productization work until it has a reproduced baseline, a measurable delta, and an explicit limitation section.
decision_rules.replacement_rule: Replace a Top 10 direction with a Tier 2 candidate if two consecutive monthly gates fail without producing a useful negative result.

directions.title: Hardware-aware quantum circuit compression
directions.strongest_evidence: Virtual-SWAP elimination removes 481 routed SWAPs and 1443 CX gates; post-virtual-SWAP 1Q resynthesis removes 60 extra gates and gives 1.018x logical T-count proxy / 1.015x T-depth proxy reduction with 0/30 Aer failures; B7 propagation gives mean STV 1.034x but min STV remains 1.0x.
directions.30_day_gate: Strengthen local proof logs plus weak T-resource diagnostic into a native-basis non-Clifford/T-depth optimizer that improves the minimum B7 factory-dominated workload, not only the mean.
directions.next_artifact: B1 native-basis T-resource optimizer report with replayable proof logs, Aer checks, and B7 schedule delta.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if reductions disappear on a broader benchmark family or if certificate generation cannot scale beyond local rewrite evidence.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until B1 passes its technical gate; likely future route is certified hardware-aware circuit compression.

directions.title: Low-overhead quantum error-correcting codes
directions.current_maturity: Stim baseline plus closed reduced-round artifact boundary; T-B2-007 posterior-weighted decoder-risk ledger over 4 risk budgets / 4608 budget-profile rows leaves mild/nominal/conservative/strict adjusted survivors at 6/5/3/3, strict high-purity survivors 0, and no robust all-profile adjusted survival.
directions.strongest_evidence: Stim/PyMatching baseline plus closed reduced-round artifact boundary; T-B2-003 analytic leakage-erasure proxy found 42 improved rows; T-B2-004 circuit-derived HERALDED_ERASE stress found 10 d=5/d=7 rows; T-B2-005 false-positive stress preserved 5 rows at fp=0.001/tick; T-B2-006 posterior calibration gave 6 raw profile-survivor rows; T-B2-007 risk ledger shrinks conservative/strict adjusted survivors to 3 and keeps strict high-purity survivors at 0.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace the posterior-weighted risk ledger with a circuit-level shot-conditioned decoder or hardware-calibrated leakage/flag dataset that preserves d=5/d=7 target-volume rows under strict posterior, missed-leakage, noise-mismatch, and realistic false-positive gates.
directions.next_artifact: B2 T-B2-008 circuit-level shot-conditioned decoder or calibrated leakage-data stress with posterior flag integration.
directions.kill_condition: Demote the leakage-erasure route if d=5/d=7 target-volume rows disappear under conservative/strict posterior-weighted risk, calibrated false-positive rates, missed-leakage bounds, or noise mismatch.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until B2 shows Wilson-bounded target-volume reduction under shot-conditioned or calibrated leakage/erasure evidence, without relying on the closed reduced-round artifact.
directions.kill_or_merge_condition: Demote the leakage-erasure route if d=5/d=7 target-volume rows disappear under conservative/strict posterior-weighted risk, calibrated false-positive rates, missed-leakage bounds, or noise mismatch.

directions.title: Quantum algorithms for molecular reaction dynamics
directions.strongest_evidence: T-B3-011 cross-molecule UCC/ADAPT pressure/demotion boundary: H2/LiH/H2O/N2 bounded high-coefficient sampled covariance pressure has 35 sampled groups total, 384 shots/group, mean/max variance error 0.0833/0.5029, max optimizer-loop shots lower bound 475,043,013,690,000, max optimizer-loop 2Q lower bound 281,225,464,104,480,000, and denominator wins remain 0.
directions.30_day_gate: Do not continue B3 as a breakthrough candidate unless a rescue-only T-B3-012 proposes real multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT covariance or stronger-than-QWC measurement with a credible denominator win path.
directions.next_artifact: B3 T-B3-012 rescue-only multi-parameter covariance/measurement report, or B3 negative-boundary note for B10-T1.
directions.kill_condition: Keep current one-parameter UCC/ADAPT + QWC route demoted; kill further B3 work without a concrete rescue mechanism.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until resource estimates become source-backed and reaction-specific.

directions.title: Verifiable quantum advantage protocols
directions.strongest_evidence: Toy hidden-trap protocol rejects four spoofing families; shared B4/B8 CNOT hidden-projection refresh proxy runs 192 configs with honest completeness 1.0, no-refresh high-leakage max soundness 0.675, and repaired high-leakage max soundness 0.0.
directions.30_day_gate: Upgrade the CNOT/projection proxy to hardware-executable randomized measurement circuits or attack it with trained/generative spoofers.
directions.next_artifact: B4/B8 hardware-randomized hidden challenge task or generative-spoofer benchmark.
directions.kill_condition: Merge into B8 if circuit-level hardness remains absent beyond property-testing proxies.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until paired B4/B8 work moves beyond CNOT/projection proxy into hardware-executable hidden challenges with soundness assumptions.

directions.title: Strongly correlated matter via hybrid quantum-tensor solvers
directions.strongest_evidence: Same 9 B10 D5 Hubbard density-response rows now have oracle-tuned and non-oracle embedding denominators, exact-state-seeded MPS pressure, one-site MPS/ALS, and two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure. The two-site prototype uses bond dimension 4, 2 restarts x 4 sweeps, mean/max response error 0.08196/0.27710, beats ALS on 4 rows, and beats seeded MPS pressure on 0 rows.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace the prototypes with canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS, or compare a fully costed quantum impurity/response kernel against the full D5 denominator ladder.
directions.next_artifact: B5 production DMRG/MPS response reference or fully costed quantum response-kernel comparison.
directions.kill_condition: Demote any B5 positive route if production DMRG/MPS or equivalent tensor denominator remains stronger under the same access and response contract.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until a real hybrid baseline beats a classical proxy on a meaningful model.

directions.title: High-temperature superconductivity search
directions.current_maturity: T-B6-003 structural/electronic proxy boundary: 38 records / 22 families / 12 expanded negatives; structural AP@12 0.611 vs formula AP@12 0.10, but family-prior AP@12 remains 1.0; post-split structural AP 0.690 vs family-prior 0.982; top-12 negative controls 3; no discovery, mechanism, DFT, crystallographic database, or computed-observable claim.
directions.strongest_evidence: The structural/electronic proxy improves over formula-only descriptors and exposes explicit negative-control pressure, but it does not beat family-prior leakage.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace curated proxy channels with real crystallographic, DFT, or B5-computed observables and expand post-2008 negatives until family priors cannot saturate.
directions.next_artifact: B6 crystallographic/DFT/B5-observable descriptor table with family-prior and negative-control audit.
directions.kill_condition: Demote B6 ranking if real structural/electronic observables still fail to beat family priors or continue promoting parent/negative-control materials.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until computed descriptors and leakage controls support a mechanism-aware ranking claim on a larger retrospective table.

directions.title: Architecture-level fault-tolerance co-design
directions.strongest_evidence: B1/B2 bridge gives 1.195x-1.616x; workload-DAG factory schedule gives mean 1.475x; FT synthesis ledger exposes gcm_h6 as the current min row at 1.086008x; w8_21 negative searches total 43480 optimizer runs with 0 exact four-arbitrary-angle replacements and 0 ledger removal.
directions.30_day_gate: Either improve the B7 minimum row through B1 T-resource work, or produce a symbolic KAK/Clifford-scaffold proof or alternate occurrence-removing rewrite for gcm_h6; do not count repeated-template savings without a verified certificate.
directions.next_artifact: B7 v0.3 claim-separated resource ledger with T-B7-010 symbolic/rewrite evidence or B1 T-B1-004 min-row improvement.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if B1/B2-linked reductions collapse once physical layout, factory throughput, and feed-forward are explicit.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until cross-layer resource reductions survive workload DAGs, layout, factory throughput, feed-forward assumptions, and occurrence-level synthesis certificates.

directions.title: Classical verification of quantum outputs
directions.strongest_evidence: Hidden-invariant verifier has honest completeness 1.0 and rejects five toy adversaries; adaptive leakage exposes 75% leakage as dangerous; shared B4/B8 circuit-refresh proxy reduces high-leakage adaptive soundness from 0.675 without refresh to 0.0; trained/generative spoofer stress reaches learned soundness 1.0 without refresh; B10-T2 proof gate rejects no-refresh high-leakage claims; restricted lemma gives a 8.94e-44 single-unknown-mask bound; device-noise transcript bridge keeps challenge_refresh/refresh_plus_rotation high-leakage soundness <=0.0208 under bounded noise; Qiskit/Aer verifier bridge instantiates 216 ideal randomized parity circuits with 0 semantic mismatches; noisy Aer bridge executes 9600 randomized parity circuits with circuit-level adversary inputs, bridge-safe honest acceptance 1.0, and adversary acceptance 0.0; backend-calibrated-style bridge executes 5760 GenericBackendV2 target-property-derived noisy circuits with safe calibrated honest acceptance 1.0 and adversary acceptance 0.25.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace GenericBackendV2 calibration snapshots with real backend properties or run hardware randomized-measurement verifier execution for B10-T2.
directions.next_artifact: B10-T2 real-backend-properties verifier bridge or B4/B8 hardware randomized verifier.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if hidden invariants remain too easy to infer once challenge refresh and adaptive generative spoofers are added.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until the B4/B8 circuit-refresh proxy survives stronger trained spoofers and real-backend or hardware-executable randomized measurements.

directions.title: Quantum PCP and local Hamiltonian hardness
directions.strongest_evidence: Exact small-instance gap lab plus finite-instance failed gap-amplification negative lemma, Lean-style symbolic skeleton, and named-family cluster-stabilizer width/locality skeleton: 18 configurations, 9 locality-preserving candidates, 0 accepted local candidates, 4 strict width-trap counterexamples, 9 dense locality traps, 5 symbolic definitions, 3 theorem skeletons, 5 open proof obligations, and n=4,5,6 cluster_stabilizer_open_uniform_reweight rows where all terms scale by 1.35, max locality remains 3, raw gap amplifies, normalized gap is invariant, and the certificate is rejected.
directions.30_day_gate: Create a real Lean/mathlib or equivalent proof-checkable project and formalize the open-boundary cluster-stabilizer support-size, uniform-scaling, spectral-width, and normalized-gap invariance lemmas for all n >= 4.
directions.next_artifact: B9 T-B9-004 proof-checkable named-family theorem or explicit proof-environment blocker.
directions.kill_condition: Keep only as a negative-result track unless a restricted theorem target becomes precise.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until a restricted theorem or reusable negative lemma is formalized.

directions.title: Mapping the boundary of BQP
directions.current_maturity: b5_same_access_sampling_bridge_blocked_dmrg_required_plus_t2_backend_calibrated_style_bridge T-B10-013 now adds an optimistic response-sampler cost stress: min/median/max shots to match exact-state-seeded MPS pressure are 3.861e9 / 7.645e12 / 2.849e29, and 0 rows beat explicit D5 matvec ops by shots.
directions.strongest_evidence: Reduction graph plus 2 formal targets; B10-T1 explicit-I/O boundary stack includes B3 demotion, B5 D5 Hubbard response denominators, MPS pressure references, T-B10-010 missing-assumption note, T-B10-011 access-contract note, and T-B10-012 same-access B5 bridge: 4 denominator ladder rows, 5 blocking sampling requirements, 6 seeded-MPS-over-non-oracle rows, 0 variational-over-seeded rows, no sampling oracle, no production DMRG, and no positive route. B10-T2 has trained-spoofer, proof-gate, restricted-lemma, transcript/device-noise, ideal/noisy Aer, and GenericBackendV2 calibrated-style verifier bridges. T-B5-004 also adds a two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure prototype feeding the B10-T1 same-access ladder.
directions.30_day_gate: T-B10-014 must replace the sampler-cost negative boundary with mature production DMRG/MPS or a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, and confidence costs; separately, replace the GenericBackendV2 bridge with real backend properties or hardware verifier execution.
directions.next_artifact: B10-T1/B5 production DMRG response reference, B5 response-sampler stress note, or B10-T2 real-backend-properties verifier bridge.
directions.kill_condition: Keep B10-T1 negative unless a same-access sampler or production DMRG/quantum response comparison beats the full denominator ladder without hidden access advantages.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until one formal target yields a source-backed restricted theorem, reusable negative lemma, or strong proof-attempt record.
directions.kill_or_merge_condition: Keep B10-T1 negative unless a production DMRG/MPS reference or same-access response oracle beats the full denominator ladder without hidden access advantages.

week_1: B2 reduced-round is closed; T-B2-004 adds Stim heralded-erasure stress, so the next gate is a shot-conditioned erasure decoder or calibrated leakage model.
Pair B4 and B8 into one verification protocol lane.
week_2: Run B1 on one broader benchmark family or document why the verifier blocks scale.
Upgrade the B7 dependency bridge to a real workload DAG.
Source-back B10-T1 or start B10-T2 proof pressure.
week_3: Connect B3 to a reaction-coordinate toy path.
Promote B5 exact-state-seeded MPS pressure reference to real variational DMRG/MPS or costed quantum-kernel comparison.
Connect B6 to a real or curated retrospective materials table.
week_4: Select 2-3 directions for deeper technical validation.
Replace weak directions only if a Tier 2 candidate has a clearer validation path.
